input.query:
-- spikes and declines: month-over-month pct change per genre-country where abs change >=50% or prev=0 and current>0
WITH gm AS (
  SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', i.InvoiceDate) AS year_month,
         g.GenreId AS genre_id,
         g.Name AS genre_name,
         c.Country AS country,
         ROUND(SUM(il.UnitPrice * il.Quantity),2) AS revenue
  FROM Invoice i
  JOIN Customer c ON i.CustomerId = c.CustomerId
  JOIN InvoiceLine il ON i.InvoiceId = il.InvoiceId
  JOIN Track t ON il.TrackId = t.TrackId
  JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId = g.GenreId
  GROUP BY year_month, genre_id, country
)
SELECT genre_id, genre_name, country, year_month,
       LAG(year_month) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) AS prev_year_month,
       LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) AS prev_revenue,
       revenue,
       CASE
         WHEN LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) IS NULL THEN NULL
         WHEN LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) = 0 THEN NULL
         ELSE ROUND((revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month))*1.0 / LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) * 100, 2)
       END AS pct_change
FROM gm
WHERE (
    LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) IS NOT NULL
    AND ABS((revenue - LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month))*1.0 / NULLIF(LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month),0)) >= 0.5
  )
  OR (
    LAG(revenue) OVER (PARTITION BY genre_id, country ORDER BY year_month) = 0
    AND revenue > 0
  )
ORDER BY genre_id, country, year_month;

output: An error occurred while running the tool. Please try again. Error: misuse of window function LAG()
